name: Potato Appetizers (Vrg)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Chives or green onions, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and chop potatoes.
2. Place potatoes in a pot and cover with water. Boil until soft.
3. Mash the cooked potatoes with oil.
4. Add seasonings to the mashed potatoes.
5. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
6. Shape the mixture into 1-inch balls.
7. Mix paprika and wheat germ together in a dish.
8. Roll each potato ball in the paprika and wheat germ mixture until fully coated.
9. Place the coated potato balls on an oiled baking sheet.
10. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for about 20 minutes.
11. Let cool before serving with toothpicks.
Total Calories Per Serving: 77
Fat: 3 grams
